title: bidens odorata
intro: Bidens odorata, also known as bur-marigold, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to reduce swelling, soothe wounds, and combat infections. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Bidens odorata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, from skin irritations to colds and flu.
